notes:

The [Status] feature is now available. You can set tags such as [In Combat], [Do Not Disturb], and [Taking a break] as your status via the [+] button in chat. Once set, the status will appear on [My Profile] and in private chats with other Commanders.

New Twilight Skins for Guus, Artemis, and Tristan — the Way of Honor stands strong.

Guus and Tristan also get a Skin+.
Dominion is under control.

title: Overgeared Hero: Merge RPG
notes:
Endless Tower has arrived.
Three new class-specific Endless Tower events, arenas, and ranking seasons have been added.
Clan Ranking is now available from the existing Player Ranking page with a Clan tab and server-group clan power leaderboard.
Dice and Fishing events are now connected to event-specific rankings, with ranking previews and reward structures shown on the event pages.

title: Clash of Kings - CoK
notes:
Official Servers
Updates:
1. Returning Player Event
- Available in Kingdoms 1-2209, excluding 1537 and 2104. Transfer range: 1-2209.
- Lords who have not logged in for >14 days by 00:00 system time on June 30 will be considered Returning Lords.
- Invite inactive Lords back and bind with them as comrades during the Returning Recruitment event from July 1 to July 31. When a bound Returning Lord completes tasks, their bound Lord will receive generous rewards.
